title: ShulkerInShulker
description: Allows players to store shulker boxes inside other shulker boxes without losing their contents, with full support for all colors.
body:
# Shulker in Shulker
Shulker in Shulker is a lightweight plugin for Spigot/Paper 1.21+ that removes the vanilla restriction and allows you to place shulker boxes inside other shulker boxes without losing their contents.

# Features
🟪 **Nested storage** – freely put any type or color of shulker box inside another shulker box.

🔒 **Safe data handling** – all items inside each shulker are preserved when moved or nested.

⚡ **Shift‑Click support** – move shulkers in and out of other shulkers quickly and intuitively.

🎨 **All variants supported** – works with every shulker box color.

🛠️ **Zero configuration** – just drop the plugin in and it works out of the box.
